US-WS-023 terminal evidence (headless transcript; not screenshot evidence)
Captured: 2026-07-24 Asia/Shanghai

$ roll workspace create --help
Usage: roll workspace create <id> --config <file> [--check] [--json]

$ roll workspace create ws-evidence --config <REPO_ROOT>/packages/cli/test/fixtures/workspace/us-ws-023-create.yaml --check --json
{
  "schema": "roll.workspace-create-result/v1",
  "mode": "check",
  "outcome": "created",
  "workspaceId": "ws-evidence",
  "root": "<WORKSPACE_ROOT>",
  "steps": [
    { "kind": "journal", "target": "<ROLL_HOME>/workspace-create/ws-evidence.pending.json", "action": "created" },
    { "kind": "directory", "target": "<WORKSPACE_ROOT>", "action": "created" },
    { "kind": "file", "target": "<WORKSPACE_ROOT>/workspace.yaml", "action": "created" },
    { "kind": "cache", "target": "<REPO_ID>", "action": "created" },
    { "kind": "registry", "target": "ws-evidence", "action": "created" }
  ]
}

$ roll workspace init ws-evidence --config <REPO_ROOT>/packages/cli/test/fixtures/workspace/us-ws-023-create.yaml
Unknown workspace subcommand "init". Use "roll workspace create".
